regenerator_note: This verify.json was produced by re-running the canonical `bbsolver verify` CLI on the shipped bbky.json + bbsm.json pair. The OK/FAIL flag reflects the per-property tolerance recorded inside the bbky.json (the ε the solver was invoked with) rather than the AE harness's per-kind defaults. The max_err values are computed from the same bbky + bbsm pair by the canonical verifier; the corpus keys themselves were produced by bbsolver 1.0.0 and v1.0.1 is verifier-compatible with v1.0.0 solver output (running v1.0.1 solve against the same bbsm yields a bit-identical bbky).
